## 📄 Description

Provide a brief summary of the changes in this PR. What LLM feature, integration, refactor, or documentation does it address?

## 📦 Type of Change

Check all that apply:

- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix - Corrected errors or fixed broken functionality
- [ ] ✨ New feature - New LLM capability, provider integration, or workflow
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactor - Improved code structure/readability
- [ ] 📝 Documentation - Updated guides, markdown docs, or examples
- [ ] 🧪 Test coverage - Added or improved tests
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling - Build/config/dependency updates (uv, .env, etc.)

## 🧠 LLM Components / Areas

Which components or areas does this PR affect?

- [ ] Prompt engineering
- [ ] API integration (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
- [ ] Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
- [ ] Fine-tuning / model customization
- [ ] Evaluation / testing
- [ ] Tool-calling / function dispatch
- [ ] Token management / memory
- [ ] Notebooks / examples
- [ ] Documentation

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Code runs without errors (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass (if present)
- [ ] Code follows PEP 8 and Black formatting
- [ ] Docstrings are clear and complete
- [ ] Comments explain non-obvious logic
- [ ] Dependencies are managed via uv and documented
- [ ] README or docs include usage or setup instructions (if relevant)

## 🧪 How to Test This PR

Describe how reviewers can test your changes:

```bash
# Example: Run a script or notebook
# 1. uv sync --frozen
# 2. python examples/chat-streaming/main.py
# 3. Check output and logs for expected results
```
